Brand.name: Polymind
Brand.tagline: Compare top AI models with one question

Metadata.title: Polymind — Compare top AI models
Metadata.description: Ask one question and compare answers from the latest GPT, Claude, and Gemini side by side.

SignIn.title: Sign in

Landing.hero: Compare top AI models with one question
Landing.heroSub: Stop guessing which model is best. Ask once, get three answers side by side.
Landing.feature1Body: Send one prompt to the latest GPT, Claude, and Gemini. See their answers stream in parallel.
Landing.feature2Body: Spot strengths, blind spots, and disagreements at a glance.
Landing.feature3Body: Conversations are saved per account so you can revisit and refine.
Landing.pricingSubtitle: No subscription. Buy credits when you need them.
Landing.pricingFreeDesc: Sign up and start asking. No card required.
Landing.pricingProDesc: 1 credit = 1 question, answered by every model in parallel.
Landing.pricingNeverExpire: Credits never expire while your account is active.

Beta.noticeBody: Polymind is in open beta. Try every feature for free — your feedback shapes v1.
